pipeline-agent.description: Controls AutoVideoFactory video pipeline, YouTube uploads, and music management

pipeline.description: Run the AutoVideoFactory pipeline with a topic and niche
pipeline.prompt: Run the AutoVideoFactory video generation pipeline. Topic: ${topic}. Niche: ${niche}. Duration: ${duration}. Publish to YouTube: ${publish}. Use the pipeline-agent to execute the full pipeline with these settings.

youtube-auth.description: Authorize a YouTube account for uploads
youtube-auth.prompt: Start the backend server and open the YouTube OAuth authorization URL so the user can log in with their Google account. Use the pipeline-agent to generate the URL.

download-music.prompt: Download trending, royalty-free background music tracks (phonk, energetic, reel-style) for video production. Use the pipeline-agent to run the download script.
